parameters.purpose: Absolute local path to the repository root.
parameters.change_when: Always replace the placeholder before importing CSV queries in Desktop.

parameters.purpose: Folder containing public-safe starter catalogs such as page and measure references.
parameters.change_when: Usually leave this on outputs/bi unless you intentionally relocate the public-safe starter assets.

parameters.purpose: Folder containing monthly monitoring marts and shared monthly dimensions.
parameters.change_when: Change this after running a unified local profile if monthly outputs land outside outputs/bi.

parameters.purpose: Folder containing secondary appendix tables for scenario, benchmark, and risk visuals.
parameters.change_when: Change this only if you want the secondary appendix page to point to local runner outputs.
